description: Tactical threat intelligence node. Armored via CSIS-pattern adoption (STIX/JSON normalization).

intel_id.description: Stable identifier for the intelligence node.

threat_type.description: Categorization of the threat (e.g. Malware, APT, Phishing, Dork).

indicators.description: List of Indicators of Compromise (IoCs) extracted (IPs, Hashes, Domains).

stix_alignment.description: Alignment status with STIX 2.1 standard (Adoption: CSIS Cyber Defence Feed Pattern).

adversary_correlation.description: Mapped MITRE ATT&CK techniques and adversary profiles.
